80.name: HTTP
80.description: HyperText Transfer Protocol - unencrypted web traffic

443.name: HTTPS
443.description: HTTP Secure - encrypted web traffic using TLS/SSL

8080.name: HTTP Alt
8080.description: Alternative HTTP - commonly used for web proxies or dev servers

8443.name: HTTPS Alt
8443.description: Alternative HTTPS - commonly used for dev servers

53.name: DNS
53.description: Domain Name System - the "phonebook of the internet"

25.name: SMTP
25.description: Simple Mail Transfer Protocol - sending email

110.name: POP3
110.description: Post Office Protocol v3 - receiving email

143.name: IMAP
143.description: Internet Message Access Protocol - accessing email

465.name: SMTPS
465.description: SMTP over SSL - secure email sending

587.name: SMTP MST
587.description: SMTP Mail Submission - email sending submission

22.name: SSH/SFTP
22.description: Secure Shell - encrypted remote access and file transfer

69.name: TFTP
69.description: Trivial FTP - simple file transfer without authentication

23.name: TELNET
23.description: TELNET (DEPRECATED) - unencrypted remote access. Use SSH instead!

67.name: DHCP Server
67.description: Dynamic Host Configuration Protocol - assigning IP addresses

5222.name: XMPP
5222.description: Extensible Messaging and Presence Protocol (Jabber) - chat/messaging

1883.name: MQTT
1883.description: Message Queuing Telemetry Transport - IoT messaging

389.name: LDAP
389.description: Lightweight Directory Access Protocol - directory services

636.name: LDAPS
636.description: LDAP over SSL - secure directory services

123.name: NTP
123.description: Network Time Protocol - synchronizing system clocks

161.name: SNMP
161.description: Simple Network Management Protocol - network monitoring
